resources.string: Scan a product or menu and see how it matches your taste.
Scan the coffee package to learn its characteristics
Open camera · read any café menu
Point the camera at a café menu and tap to scan
Camera access is required to scan a menu.
No coffee items detected. Try scanning a clearer image of the menu.
What we found about this coffee
Review and confirm the details before saving
Product lookup will appear here soon.
Coffinity is reviewing the coffee package details.
Couldn’t detect coffee details right now. Try again.
Scan the coffee package to learn its characteristics
Camera access is required to scan coffee.
Coffee interpretation confidence is limited for this product, but core details are still shown.
Try scanning the package one more time
Could not detect coffee details, try again
Scan the coffee package again and we’ll check it once more.
Saved. You can update these details any time.
We need a bit more activity before giving a personal insight.
This coffee overlaps with some of your recent preferences.
Based on your repeated behavior, this profile looks close to what you prefer.
Compared with your past preferences, this coffee may feel outside your usual profile.
You often rated notes like %1$s lower.
The roast is close to your usual %1$s preference.
You usually prefer %1$s roast, but this one is closer to %2$s.
Its acidity is close to your usual %1$s profile.
You usually prefer %1$s acidity, while this coffee is more %2$s.
This origin (%1$s) appears in your previous picks.
Its style (%1$s) is similar to coffees you usually choose.
A few more ratings, saves, or scans will make this insight more precise.
Sign in to sync your coffee identity
Built from your scans, favorites, reactions, and meet activity
Coffinity is still learning your flavor notes
We’re still getting to know your taste.
Explore bean origins to see your trends here
Scan more coffees to reveal your preferred style
Scan your first coffee to start your journey
Explore bean origins to save your favorites
Scan a café menu to find your go-to drinks
Join a coffee meet to see activity here
Create your first coffee meet and invite people
Your selected language is used throughout Coffinity.
Open operational controls for your brands
Sign in to manage your notification preferences
Control which Coffinity updates you receive.
Allow notification permission to receive push updates on Android.
You have a new Coffinity notification.
Plan a simple coffee session nearby.
Nearby coffee moments you can join right now.
No meetups in this mood yet.
Top-ranked events based on your mood, distance, and timing.
Local coffee meets within your nearby radius.
Time-sensitive events starting now or later today.
Curated events aligned with this social vibe.
Open the full local event browser with filters and sorting.
No local events match this filter right now.
Discover like-minded coffee people in your community
Finding real coffee people with shared interests…
Real users matched by city, mood, taste, and activity.
Coffee people from your city will appear here as they join the community.
Complete your profile and join events to unlock better matches.
Add your coffee mood, brewing interests, and city to get stronger matches.
You already have a pending invite for this user
Pick a mood, join a room, or let Coffinity match you in seconds.
Sign in to join coffee meets and create your own
Sign in to join coffee meets
You can join again anytime if you change your mind.
Update your event details and keep everyone informed.
This will remove the event for everyone.
Please complete title, location, time, and purpose.
Complete title, location, time, and purpose to continue.
Couldn’t open map search. Enter location manually.
Monthly create limit reached for your plan.
Monthly join limit reached for your plan.
Upgrade your plan to unlock more coffee events.
Your plan allows up to %1$d attendees per event.
Please wait, your previous request is still processing.
Couldn’t complete this action. Please try again.
Join me at this coffee event on Coffinity ☕
Couldn’t open share options right now.
No nearby events yet. Upcoming coffee meets will appear here.
Couldn’t open Google Maps right now.
Tap an item chip to remove it.
Add an offer title to continue.
Add at least one included item.
Add a valid price for pay-at-venue offers.
Select a currency for this offer.
How do you feel like drinking today?
Top picks for this mood. Tap mood or reshuffle to change.
Create your account to join nearby coffee meets and host your own.
By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
Already have an account? Sign in
Sign in to join coffee meets and keep your Coffinity profile in sync.
Don\'t have an account? Create one
Point your camera at any coffee or café menu to discover your taste.
Get coffee picks tailored to your mood and flavor preferences.
Connect with coffee lovers who share your taste and vibe.
Coffinity may earn a small commission — at no cost to you.
Discover premium beans, warm flavors,\nand beautiful coffee moments every day.
Explore the world through coffee origins
This method is best prepared manually for authentic flavor and texture.
Classic espresso drinks and milk-based staples
Cultural brewing traditions and heritage techniques
%1$s belongs to the espresso family with balanced body and intensity.
%1$s highlights clean extraction and hands-on brewing control.
%1$s reflects a heritage preparation rooted in coffee culture.
%1$s delivers a smooth chilled profile with low perceived acidity.
%1$s is built for convenient daily brewing with stable results.
%1$s uses pressure-based extraction to build concentrated flavor.
%1$s controls flow and contact time for a clear, structured cup.
%1$s relies on traditional pacing and ritual to shape taste and aroma.
%1$s extracts with cold water over time for softness and sweetness.
%1$s simplifies brewing into repeatable steps for everyday consistency.
Prepare fresh coffee and water for %1$s.
Extract %1$s with controlled pressure and shot timing.
Brew %1$s with steady pouring and even extraction flow.
Build %1$s gradually with gentle heat and ritual pacing.
Extract %1$s slowly at a low temperature.
Run %1$s with a simple preset or standardized routine.
Taste and adjust %1$s to your preferred balance.
Milk drinks with stronger coffee base
%1$s worked best for me with freshly ground beans.
A small adjustment made %1$s noticeably smoother.
At home, prepare %1$s with fresh water and calibrated grind for a cleaner cup.
Sign in to leave a real review linked to your account.
Be the first to rate this brewing method.
Explore this cup through %1$s notes and pair it with your preferred brew method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Travel across the world and discover premium beans by region.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Email sign-in is not enabled right now.
Check your internet connection and try again.
No account was found for this email.
Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
Explore coffees by craft and origin in one refined hub.
Built to expand with Coffee Types, Trending, and personalized discovery.
Brew Methods reveals technique-driven coffees and preparation styles.
Origins brings country profiles and bean variety stories into focus.
Discover coffee brands, products, and real community reviews.
Powered only by real reviews and community quality signals.
Rising now from recent reviews and real engagement.
Sponsored visibility slots with fair rotation across brands.
Try another keyword or suggest a missing brand.
Brand profiles will appear here as the catalog grows.
This brand profile is ready for its first product entry.
Sign in to add a real review linked to your account.
Be the first to rate this brand.
Be the first to review this coffee.
Share missing brands so Coffinity can review and add them.
Suggest a missing %1$s product for review.
This product looks like %1$s. Create a draft brand if missing.
Paste a brand website, review detected details, and create only after confirmation.
Paste a product page link, review detected details, and save only after confirmation.
Product name could not be detected.
Image URL could not be detected.
Roast level could not be detected.
Some product details could not be detected.
Draft brand created and product saved successfully.
A similar product already exists. Review before saving again.
Please enter a valid brand website URL.
Couldn’t reach this website. Check the URL and try again.
Not enough brand information could be extracted from this page.
We couldn’t import this page right now. Try again shortly.
Brand could not be saved right now. Please try again.
Thanks. Your suggestion is now pending review.
A similar suggestion is already pending review.
This item is no longer available.
We couldn’t save your review right now. Please try again.
Scoped controls for your managed brands
Search by name, city, or country
Try another search or status to continue.
Use controlled URL imports to speed up catalog operations.
No brands available for import tools
Create or assign a brand first to use product imports.
Open this brand to run product import from URL.
Create a new brand quickly and set it as draft or active.
User brand suggestions will appear here for review.
Suggestion converted and published as active brand.
This area is available only to super admins and assigned brand admins.
Assigned brands will appear here when access is granted.
Suggest a brand and track its review status here.
Sign in to submit and track your brand suggestions.
Suggestion submitted. We found possible duplicates and queued it for review.
Please enter a valid website URL.
Your suggestion is in queue for admin review.
An admin is currently reviewing this suggestion.
Your suggestion was approved as a new brand.
Your suggestion was merged into an existing brand.
Select a target brand before merging.
Search by name, website, or city
Update core brand information visible in Coffinity.
Add, remove, or import products for this brand.
Add a first product to start building this brand catalog.
Assign or revoke brand admin access.
Hide this brand from public discovery without deleting its data.
Brand is visible to users again.
This hides the brand from users while preserving all existing data. You can restore it later.
You do not have permission for this action.
This email does not have a Coffinity account yet.
This user is already assigned to the brand.
Low agitation and a rounded body for calm, late-morning sipping.
Creamy texture and caramel warmth for a gentle ritual.
Balanced sweetness with soft foam and very little sharpness.
Dense extraction with higher intensity for immediate momentum.
Double espresso diluted for longer sipping without losing punch.
Compact brew with bright bite and quick prep before work.
Clean floral profile that keeps your palate sharp and clear.
Steady caffeine lift with minimal sweetness distraction.
Controlled ratio and timing for repeatable concentration sessions.
Friendly sweetness and milk body that pairs with long conversations.
Airy foam and cocoa notes with broad crowd appeal.
Sweet caramel profile for relaxed catch-ups and dessert pairing.
Experiment with pressure and ratios for surprising clarity.
Play with bloom and pulse pours to highlight terroir.
Taste how roast level shifts sweetness, acidity, and body.
A slow, meditative pour that grounds your morning with clarity.
Soft sweetness and warmth for a peaceful afternoon ritual.
Bright floral notes and berry brightness to awaken curiosity.
Bold and unexpected, slow-steeped for 18 hours of deep character.
Creamy foam and gentle warmth for a cozy end-of-day ritual.
Full-bodied and deep, perfect for a quiet night in.
A balanced Brazilian classic with round body and a creamy cocoa finish.
Vibrant and aromatic with berry sparkle and delicate floral sweetness.
Rich aroma with caramel body and an elegant toasted almond aftertaste.
Smooth espresso and velvety milk lifted by warm vanilla sweetness.
A silky chilled latte with caramel depth and a plush mouthfeel.
Classic cappuccino texture with deep cocoa aroma and microfoam luxury.
